items.name: Active Directory
items.detail: Hands-on support within a delegated enterprise environment, including workstation OU management, security group administration, scoped permission changes, and workstation account enable/disable operations.

items.name: Microsoft Entra ID
items.detail: Supported identity and access workflows including MFA method management, authentication recovery, user verification, and access troubleshooting in Microsoft 365 environments.

items.name: MFA & Authentication
items.detail: Troubleshot and supported multi-factor authentication workflows across Entra ID, Duo, and PingID environments, including enrollment, recovery, and account access restoration.

items.name: Ivanti Neurons ITSM
items.detail: Managed daily incident and service-request operations within an enterprise healthcare environment, including ticket documentation, escalation coordination, workflow analysis, saved searches, and activity-history review.

items.name: Incident Management
items.detail: Handled escalated support issues across multiple technical domains, coordinating ownership, documenting user impact, and routing incidents to the appropriate infrastructure, application, or operational teams.

items.name: Operational Analysis & RCA Support
items.detail: Identified recurring issue patterns, documented operational findings, and gathered cross-team troubleshooting context to support process improvement and root-cause analysis efforts.

items.name: Citrix / VDI
items.detail: Supported enterprise Citrix environments including login/session troubleshooting, static virtual desktops, profile-related issues, endpoint redirection, and Workspace client support.

items.name: Epic
items.detail: Supported Epic-connected workflows in a healthcare environment, including workstation access issues, printing dependencies, peripheral integration, and endpoint troubleshooting tied to clinical operations.

items.name: Microsoft 365
items.detail: Troubleshot Outlook, Teams, Office applications, OWA, OneDrive, mailbox access issues, and general Microsoft 365 client-side support across enterprise support roles.

items.name: Cisco VPN
items.detail: Supported remote-access troubleshooting for VPN-connected users, including authentication issues, connectivity failures, and virtual desktop access workflows.

items.name: Supabase / PostgreSQL
items.detail: Used in self-directed platform development for relational schema design, hosted database structure, and backend data modeling within modern web application workflows.

items.name: SharePoint
items.detail: Worked with SharePoint-based knowledge organization, structured documentation systems, collaborative content management, and governed information architecture workflows.

items.name: Microsoft Power Platform
items.detail: Explored workflow automation, knowledge-management concepts, and operational process design within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem using Power Platform tooling.

items.name: Git / GitHub
items.detail: Used Git and GitHub for version control, repository management, GitHub Pages deployment, and maintaining structured project history across personal and technical portfolio projects.

items.name: Python
items.detail: Used Python for utility scripting, workflow tooling, automation experiments, and self-directed systems-oriented project development.

items.name: PowerShell
items.detail: Used PowerShell for Windows administration tasks, utility scripting, local system inspection, and operational troubleshooting workflows.

items.name: .NET / C#
items.detail: Designed and built a self-directed multi-component platform architecture involving APIs, worker services, desktop UI concepts, and integration layers, with implementation supported through AI-assisted C# development.
